ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial instrument */,
  "line_item" TEXT /* Line item associated with the financial instrument */,
  "category" INTEGER /* Category of the financial instrument (e.g., Mortgages, Construction Loans) */,
  "parent_instrument_id" INTEGER /* Parent financial instrument ID for hierarchical relationships */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the financial instrument (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the financial instrument was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the financial instrument was last updated */,
  "risk_rating" TEXT /* Risk rating of the financial instrument */,
  "interest_rate" TEXT /* Interest rate associated with the financial instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_instruments_parent_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_instruments_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category ID for hierarchical relationships */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial value */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter (e.g., Dec, Sep, Jun, Mar) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the financial instrument for the quarter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the financial value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the financial value was last updated */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the financial value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_values_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_values_quarter FOREIGN KEY ("quarter") REFERENCES quarters ("quarter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_values_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quarters" (
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quarter */,
  "quarter_name" TEXT /* Name of the quarter (e.g., Dec, Sep, Jun, Mar) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quarter */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the quarter */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the quarter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quarter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., quarterly, annual) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the report */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who approved the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report detail */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the financial instrument for the quarter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the report detail was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the report detail was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" INTEGER /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, executive) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the report was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
